item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
that's 4 more than i need, pass
chili and cheese
diggin the fit
that is 100% her neck
what's it taste like?
fall/halloween is by far the best time for weather in my area
what about dipwads?
finally, a new liquid
we used to be a country, a proper country
can i go tv and say leela from futurama
ok
as a treat
mmm hmm
yes
animal hoarding is sickening but man what a great comment
amen brotha
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: 1 Oodle of Unmuted Faves
item.description:
Such grace!
Song by Rachel Bloom - full version here: https://youtu.be/zgUKQCVieWM?si=1NdDzd0ZwRdBTjlf
French Fuse https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzLFySnc_T_qFHAJ2HTWUTw
Aries Spears https://www.ariesspears.com/
Atlas, the most fantastic meower of imgurian @friendlynoodles! Upvotes go here: https://imgur.com/gallery/atlas-face-vs-his-voice-rWi7rWF
Les Fo'Plafonds https://lesfoplafonds.com/
Gary Meikle https://www.garymeikle.com/
--- For more unmuted faves just click on the #oodles tag

item.title: World's closest bottom shelf meme dump! (You are here)
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
Meet my god-fearing Nana.
Join for the games. Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Instead of blocking the scam account, I decided to accept the DM and allow the bottom shelf community to submit the unhinged replies they wanted me to send him. I was not disappointed. This inspired our new terrible streaming idea which will premiere tomorrow at 9:45pm CST.
Date with us! Disclaimer: We have no plans of leading anyone on. This will be in fun, lighthearted humor. We will let them off the hook early by telling them who we are shortly after initiating the conversation. twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Come heckle us. Follow the channel to be notified when we go live.
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: I am this old. Just the sounds ….
item.description:
The anticipation of the install was exciting at the time.
And Doom was arguably the game that really kick started the whole 3D gaming industry!
Nowadays you can run it on your toothbrush!!

item.title: TheFreePizzaDude is back!!!
item.description:
Welcome to TheFreePizzaDude post ＼⁠(⁠°⁠o⁠°⁠)⁠／ If you'd like to help an Imgurian in need get some food today, here's how it works -
You can find a request for food in the comments, reply to them and then send a DM to get an order set up Or you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we will send the food for you!
Anonymous Angels have been such a huge part of us being able to help more people - https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude
And here's how you'd send it yourself! Any questions as an Angel? Just shoot us a message! We'll be on this username until 8pm central
Nanna Pants is here to show you how it works for requests -
It's much easier for us to help requests in the US but we'll do our best to pick up requests from any country. Putting your country in your comment helps us match you to an Angel in your area
Any questions as a requestor? Just leave a comment! We'll have helpers on the post for 6 hours
14,194 meals since we started 875 grocery orders sent 6 more hours to help as many people as we can Let's get it going! ... Today's Pizza Tally 230 1st, 2nd, 3rd and 4th by @OP 245 5th and 6th by Pizza Angel @BadPunsAPlenty 310 7th and 8th by Pizza Angel @hesbeginningtobelieve 335 9th, 10th, 11th and 12th by @OP 425 13th, 14th, 15th and 16th by @OP 525 17th, 18th 19th, 20th and 21st by Pizza Angel @AyatollahBahloni 545 22nd by Pizza Angel @veesee 600 Michael Jordan, Kobe Bryant and 25th by Pizza Angel @rawrberry 620 26th and 27th by Pizza Angel @InterTakerWeb 630 28th by Pizza Angel @IPreferTheNight 700 29th by Pizza Angel @OuchYoureOnMyHair 745 30th, 31st and 32nd by Pizza Angel @IrvingSchwinglepuck ... Alright everyone that's it for @OP Today we sent out 32 meals That's 14,226 meals since we started 875 grocery orders sent Well done everyone, see you next week!
item.dc:creator: TheFreePizzaDude
